applicability_notes: Unary activation; replaces torch.celu (equivalently torch.nn.CELU / max(0,x)+min(0, alpha*(exp(x/alpha)-1))). alpha defaults to 1.0. Validated with PCC>=0.99 and ULP checks over range [-100,100] including +/-inf and nan.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small_2d (h=64, w=128) and generic test shapes
placement_observations.source: unit_test: tt_in created with layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG
